raw_consumer_statement:
The company Citibank is giving me the round around also telling me the document I provided to them should not be a picture of evidences or they don't accept my answer meanwhile the company in question never answered them, but Citibank still favor them over me their client. 
I will not pay a dime of that amount anymore and I will like to take this case to arbitration, mediation or the judiciary court, whichever appropriate, for this case!
